sections.title: What matters for invoicing in Oman
sections.body: Most tools can produce a PDF invoice. The real differences for an Omani business are whether there is a genuine free plan, native OMR with three decimals, the 5% GCC VAT preset, a proper Arabic interface, and a way for customers to pay online by card. Weigh those five points and the shortlist gets clear quickly.
items: A real free-forever plan, not a trial
Arabic RTL, multi-currency and online card payments

sections.title: How the main options compare
sections.body: Paper & Pen is free forever for invoicing, Arabic-first, native to OMR and 5% VAT, and takes Paymob card payments out of the box, then grows into a full ERP. Zoho Books is a capable accounting suite but has no free-forever core and only partial Arabic. Wafeq offers solid Arabic accounting but is paid and more accounting-focused. For a free, Arabic, Oman-ready start, Paper & Pen is the clearest pick, while Zoho and Wafeq suit teams that want a paid, accounting-led product.
items: Paper & Pen: free, Arabic-first, OMR and Paymob, full ERP path
Zoho Books: capable, paid core, partial Arabic
Wafeq: solid Arabic accounting, paid, accounting-focused

faqs.q: What is the best free invoicing software in Oman?
faqs.a: For a genuinely free start with native OMR, 5% VAT, an Arabic interface and online card payments, Paper & Pen is the strongest pick. Zoho Books and Wafeq are capable but paid and more accounting-led.

faqs.q: Is Paper & Pen free for businesses in Oman?
faqs.a: Yes. Sales and invoicing are free forever with no limit on invoices or customers. You only pay for optional modules such as Inventory, HR or Accounting.

faqs.q: Does it handle OMR and 5% VAT correctly?
faqs.a: Yes. The Omani rial is supported with three decimals and the 5% GCC VAT rate is preset. Tax and currency are also configurable for any other market.

faqs.q: Can my customers pay invoices online in Oman?
faqs.a: Yes. Paymob and regional gateways are built in, so customers pay by card straight from the invoice link.
Yes. Paper & Pen runs a full right-to-left Arabic interface and Arabic documents, with English, Hindi, Bengali and Urdu for mixed teams.

ctaSub: Create a free workspace, invoice in OMR with 5% VAT, and take card payments today. Arabic-ready, free forever.
